pool.baseline: it’s just so quiet here. i walk into the kitchen and i forget for a split second that he’s not coming back, and then it hits me all over again. the house feels like a tomb. i don't even recognize myself in the mirror anymore. i feel like i’m just a ghost wandering around a life that doesn't belong to me anymore. everything feels so pointless.

pool.baseline: i was just looking at some photos of deep space tonight and it just hit me how much of a joke everything is. like, in a few billion years the sun dies, then the stars go out, and it's just... nothing. every single thing we do, every stupid little struggle, it all just evaporates. it feels like we're just fighting to stay alive in a universe that doesn't even know we're here. what's even the point of carrying on if the end result is just absolute void anyway?

pool.baseline: The candlelight flickers low, much like the spirit within my breast. He is gone... everything I built, every vow, shattered like cheap glass upon the cobblestones. I look at the dark river outside my window and I feel an awful, heavy pull. It would be so quiet there. So peaceful to just... let the current take the weight of this heart away. There is no light left for me in this world, only the shadow of what I thought I was.
